name: Elliot Sinclair | "I'm being rescued?"
description:
You and your comrades raided a Legion base when you found a widow, Elliot Sinclair. When you guys got back to your base, you were charged with taking care of he until she can take care of herself at some point. She seems quiet, but she may open up with more time.

Thanks for 102 followers! Make sure to like and make a comment, either it be generous or constructive criticism, on this bot, and if you like the bot, do check out my Fallout OC bots. If you want me to remake a certain bot, do ask. You guys are wonderful and I love taking time out of my day making you guys happy.

I use a discord server to promote my media. But also my favorite bot creators are in. THIS LINK

Also apologies for not being so active. I usually use more than make. Also I'm studying law to (hopefully) become an attorney.
creator: Vergils_Humanity
